DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT ESTIFANOS TESFAI'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S ANSWERS TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY REQUESTS IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 5, 2021 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. PER THE INSTRUCTIONS POSTED ON THE DEPARTMENT'S WEBSITE (HTTPS://SFSUPERIORCOURT.ORG/DIVISIONS/CIVIL/LAW-MOTION), PARTIES MUST ATTACH ELECTRONIC COPIES OF DISCOVERY MOTION PAPERS TO AN EMAIL ADDRESSED TO DISCOVERY302@SFTC.ORG. THE SUBJECT LINE OF THE EMAIL SHOULD STATE THE CASE NAME AND NUMBER AND THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE. =(302)

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE OCT-05-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT ESTIFANOS TESFAI'S DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S ANSWERS TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY REQUESTS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE UNOPPOSED MOTION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY REQUESTS WITHIN 10 DAYS. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT TOM@THOMASCOHEN.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: TOM COHEN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Defendant'S Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Answers To Written Discovery Requests
Off Calendar Oct-05-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT ESTIFANOS TESFAI's Defendant's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Answers To Written Discovery Requests.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. The unopposed motion is granted. Plaintiff shall serve code compliant responses to written discovery requests within 10 days.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at tom@thomascohen.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
